text:
Created attachment 145494
update, v2.1

Are you sure? I don't have enough courage/time to engage upstream.

A few changes meanwhile:
- jump on maintainer ship (alas, no co-maintainer support) to dodge ports@
- rebase after r364130 and r363008
- remove bsd.port.options.mk from alsa-lib, alsa-utils
